<?php /** * League.Uri (https://uri.thephpleague.com) * * (c) Ignace Nyamagana Butera <nyamsprod@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace League\Uri\Idna; /** * @see https://unicode-org.github.io/icu-docs/apidoc/released/icu4c/uidna_8h.html */ final class Result { private function __construct( private readonly string $domain, private readonly bool $isTransitionalDifferent, /** @var array<Error> */ private readonly array $errors ) { } /** * @param array{result:string, isTransitionalDifferent:bool, errors:int} $infos */ public static function fromIntl(array $infos): self { return new self($infos['result'], $infos['isTransitionalDifferent'], Error::filterByErrorBytes($infos['errors'])); } public function domain(): string { return $this->domain; } public function isTransitionalDifferent(): bool { return $this->isTransitionalDifferent; } /** * @return array<Error> */ public function errors(): array { return $this->errors; } public function hasErrors(): bool { return [] !== $this->errors; } public function hasError(Error $error): bool { return in_array($error, $this->errors, true); } }
